translations.**paths 部分則為匹配規則，能支援以下幾種語法：**\n\n: **The paths section defines matching rules and supports the following syntax:**

translations.*- 舊版不支援 Query (?name=123)、Anchor (#titl: *- The old version does not support Query (?name=123) or Anchor (#title).*
translations.*- 請注意，他不是 Regex，不支援任何 Regex 寫法。*\n\n: *- Note that it is not a Regex and does not support any Regex syntax.*
translations.*WWDC 有提到與舊版兼容， **當 iOS ≥ 13 有讀到新的格式就會忽略: *WWDC mentioned backward compatibility: **when iOS ≥ 13 reads the new format, it will ignore the old paths**.*
translations.*listen on **8080** port ，如果沒有衝突則不需要修改。*: *Listen on **8080** port. No need to change if there is no conflict.*
translations.*⚠️ **每次啟動分配到的網址都會變，所以僅能作為開發測試使用。***\n\n: *⚠️ **The URL assigned changes every time the app launches, so it can only be used for development testing.***
translations.*⚠️ **這邊有個坑** ，app-site-association 可以放在: *⚠️ **Here is a gotcha**: the app-site-association file can be placed in the website root or the `./.well-known` directory; however, in mode=developer it only checks `./.well-known/app-site-association`, which made me think it wasn’t working.*
translations.*⚠️ `.well-known` 建立後若消失，請注意 Mac 要打開「顯示隱: *⚠️ If `.well-known` disappears after creation, make sure to enable the "Show Hidden Files" feature on your Mac:*
translations.*⚠️* `apple-app-site-association` *看起來沒有: *⚠️* `apple-app-site-association` *appears to have no file extension, but it actually has a .json extension:*
translations.*如果出現 404/403 錯誤則請檢查 root 目錄是否正確、目錄/檔案是否: *If you encounter 404/403 errors, please check whether the root directory is correct, whether the directory/files are placed properly, and if the apple-app-site-association file mistakenly has an extension (.json).*
translations.*如果有多個 appID 則要重複加入多組。*\n\n: *If there are multiple appIDs, add multiple sets accordingly.*
translations.*我自己覺得應該最慢 48 小時，就會更新吧。。。所以下次有更改到 apple-: *I personally think it should update within 48 hours at the latest... So next time you make changes to the apple-app-site-association file, it's recommended to update it online a few days before submitting the app update.*
translations.*最後記得將 Associated Domains applinks: 改為正試: *Finally, remember to change Associated Domains applinks: to the official testing URL.*
translations.*開發階段都測試 OK 後，將確認修改過之後的 apple-app-site-a: *After confirming that all tests pass during the development phase, provide the updated apple-app-site-association file to the backend for uploading to the server to ensure everything works perfectly.*
translations.*頁面出現 404 不要理他，因為我們實際沒有那一頁；我們只是要測 iOS 對網: *Ignore the 404 page because we don't actually have that page; we are just testing whether iOS URL matching works as expected. If "Open" appears above, it means the match is successful. You can also test the NOT inverse condition.*
translations.- For iOS < 14, the app requests the Uni:
- For iOS < 14, the app requests the apple-app-site-association file of the Universal Links website upon first install or update.

- For iOS ≥ 14, Apple CDN caches and periodically updates the apple-app-site-association file for Universal Links websites; the app fetches it from Apple CDN during the first install or update. However, this may cause the apple-app-site-association on Apple CDN to be outdated.
translations.- [iOS Cross-Platform Account and Passwo:
- [iOS Cross-Platform Account and Password Integration to Enhance Login Experience](../948ed34efa09/)

- [iOS Deferred Deep Link Implementation (Swift)](../b08ef940c196/)
translations.- `$(alpha)` ：A-Z and a-z\n\n- `$(upper):
- `$(alpha)` ：A-Z and a-z

- `$(upper)` ：A-Z

- `$(lower)` ：a-z

- `$(alnum)` ：A-Z, a-z, and 0–9

- `$(digit)` ：0–9

- `$(xdigit)` : Hexadecimal characters, 0–9 and a,b,c,d,e,f,A,B,C,D,E,F

- `$(region)`: ISO region code [isoRegionCodes](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/foundation/locale/2293271-isoregioncodes){:target="_blank"}, e.g., TW

- `$(lang)` ：ISO language code [isoLanguageCodes](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/foundation/locale/2293744-isolanguagecodes){:target="_blank"}, Ex: zh
- `*` : Matches 0 or more characters, e.g., `/home/*` (home/alan…)

- `?`: Matches exactly 1 character, e.g., `201?` (2010~2019)

- `?*` ：Matches 1 or more characters, e.g., `/?*` (/test, /home..)

- `NOT`: negation exclusion, e.g., `NOT /help` (any url but /help)
translations.> ***Here, we use the assigned URL** `ht: > ***Here, we use the assigned URL** `https://ec87f78bec0f.ngrok.io/` as an example*

translations.> *Finally, remember to change Associate: > *Finally, remember to change Associated Domains applinks: to the official testing URL.*
translations.> *I personally think it should update w: > *I personally think it should update within 48 hours at the latest... So next time you make changes to the apple-app-site-association file, it's recommended to update it online a few days before submitting the app update.*
translations.> *If there are multiple appIDs, add mul: > *If there are multiple appIDs, add multiple sets accordingly.*
translations.> *If you encounter 404/403 errors, plea: > *If you encounter 404/403 errors, please check whether the root directory is correct, whether the directory/files are placed properly, and if the apple-app-site-association file mistakenly has an extension (.json).*
translations.> *Ignore the 404 page because we don't: > *Ignore the 404 page because we don't actually have that page; we are just testing whether iOS URL matching works as expected. If "Open" appears above, it means the match is successful. You can also test the NOT inverse condition.*
translations.> *Listen on **8080** port. No need to c: > *Listen on **8080** port. No need to change if there is no conflict.*
translations.> *WWDC mentioned backward compatibility: > *WWDC mentioned backward compatibility: **when iOS ≥ 13 reads the new format, it will ignore the old paths**.*
translations.> *⚠️ **Here is a gotcha**: the app-site: > *⚠️ **Here is a gotcha**: the app-site-association file can be placed in the website root or the `./.well-known` directory; however, in mode=developer it only checks `./.well-known/app-site-association`, which made me think it wasn’t working.*
translations.> *⚠️ **The URL assigned changes every t: > *⚠️ **The URL assigned changes every time the app launches, so it can only be used for development testing.***
translations.> *⚠️ If `.well-known` disappears after: > *⚠️ If `.well-known` disappears after creation, make sure to enable the "Show Hidden Files" feature on your Mac:*

translations.`appIDs` 為陣列，可放入多組 appID，這樣就不用像以前一樣只能整個區: `appIDs` is an array that can hold multiple appIDs, so you no longer need to repeat the entire block like before.
translations.app-site-association 內容的修改，好一點的話可以自行修改伺服: Modifying the app-site-association content is best done directly on the server; however, for those of us who don't always have access to the server, testing Universal Links can be very troublesome. We have to constantly bother backend colleagues for help, so it's important to finalize the app-site-association content before going live. Constant changes can drive colleagues crazy.
translations.iOS 13, iOS 14 Universal Links 新鮮事＆建立本地測: iOS 13, iOS 14 Universal Links Updates & Setting Up a Local Testing Environment
translations.iOS < 14，APP 在第一次安裝、更新時會去詢問 Universal Li: For iOS < 14, the app requests the Universal Links website's apple-app-site-association file upon first installation or update.
translations.iOS ≥ 14 ，則是由 Apple CDN 做快取定期更新 Universa: For iOS ≥ 14, Apple CDN caches and periodically updates the apple-app-site-association file for Universal Links websites; the APP fetches it from Apple CDN during the first install or update. However, this can cause an issue where the apple-app-site-association on Apple CDN might still be outdated.
translations.並且可以搭配使用，假設今天 `/user/?id=100#detail` 才需要: They can also be used together. For example, if only `/user/?id=100#detail` should open the APP, you can write:
translations.假設我們的網址有多語系，我想要支援 Universal links 時，可以這樣: If our website supports multiple languages and we want to enable Universal Links, we can set it up like this:
translations.儲存修改完後，下指令啟動 nginx：\n\n: After saving the changes, run the command to start nginx:
translations.其中匹配語法同原本語法，也是支援 `*` `?` `?*` 。\n\n: The matching syntax is the same as the original and also supports `*`, `?`, and `?*`.
translations.再下 killall finder 重啟所有 finder，即可。\n\n: Then run killall finder to restart all Finder processes.
translations.加上 mode=developer 後，APP 在模擬器上每次 Build &: After adding mode=developer, the APP will fetch the latest app-site-association from the website every time it is Build & Run on the simulator.
translations.匹配規則改放在 `components` 中；支援 3 種類型：\n\n: Matching rules are now placed in `components`; supports 3 types:
translations.反向排除則改為指定 `exclude: true` 。\n\n: For reverse exclusion, specify `exclude: true` instead.
translations.另外我們也可以從 ngrok 運行狀態視窗中看到每次 APP Build & R: We can also check from the ngrok status window whether each APP Build & Run requests the apple-app-site-association file:
translations.可以取得當前 Apple CDN 上的版本長怎樣。（記得加上 Request H: You can get the current version on Apple CDN. (Remember to add the Request Header `Host=https://app-site-association.cdn-apple.com/`)
translations.回到瀏覽器改輸入 `https://ec87f78bec0f.ngrok.io/: Go back to the browser and enter `https://ec87f78bec0f.ngrok.io/.well-known/apple-app-site-association` to see if the apple-app-site-association file can be downloaded and viewed correctly. If there are no issues, you can proceed to the next step.
translations.因前述的 CDN 問題，那我們在開發階段該如何 debug 呢？\n\n: Due to the aforementioned CDN issue, how can we debug during the development phase?
translations.在有使用 `SceneDelegate` 的情況下，open universal: When using `SceneDelegate`, the entry point for opening a universal link is in the SceneDelegate:
translations.在檔案上按右鍵 -> 「取得資訊 Get Info」->「Name & Exte: Right-click on the file -> "Get Info" -> "Name & Extension" -> Check if there is a file extension & uncheck "Hide extension" if needed
translations.大概在第 44 行的位置將 location / 裡的 root 換成你想要的目: Around line 44, change the root inside location / to the directory you want (here, Documents is used as an example).
translations.如果對設定檔內容沒有靈感，可偷偷參考其他網站福的內容，只要在服務網站首頁網址加上: If you have no ideas for the content of the configuration file, you can secretly refer to other websites' files by adding `/app-site-association` or `/.well-known/app-site-association` to the homepage URL of their service website to read their settings.
translations.如果是 iOS <14 記得有更改過 app-site-association: For iOS <14, if you have changed the app-site-association file, remember to delete it and then rebuild & run the app to fetch the latest version. For iOS ≥ 14, please follow the previously mentioned method and add mode=developer.
translations.如果有更改 `nginx.conf` 記得要下：\n\n: If you make changes to `nginx.conf`, remember to run:
translations.如果沒安裝過 [brew](https://brew.sh/index_zh-t: If you haven't installed [brew](https://brew.sh/index_zh-tw){:target="_blank"} yet, you can install it first:
translations.如果能正常下載代表本地環境模擬成功！\n\n: If the download works properly, it means the local environment simulation is successful!
translations.如果要 Build & Run 在實機則要先去「設定」->「開發者」-> 打開「: To Build & Run on a real device, first go to "Settings" -> "Developer" -> turn on the "Associated Domains Development" option.
translations.安裝完 nginx 後，前往 `/usr/local/etc/nginx/` 打: After installing nginx, go to `/usr/local/etc/nginx/` and open the `nginx.conf` file for editing:
translations.將 `TeamID.BundleId` 換成你的專案設定 (ex: TeamID: Replace `TeamID.BundleId` with your project settings (e.g., TeamID = `ABCD`, BundleID = `li.zhgchg.demoapp` => `ABCD.li.zhgchg.demoapp`).
translations.將 ngrok 分配到的網址輸入到 Associated Domains app: Enter the URL assigned by ngrok into the Associated Domains applinks: setting.
translations.對於一個有網站又有 APP 的服務， Universal Links 的功能對於: For a service that has both a website and an app, Universal Links are crucial for user experience, enabling seamless integration between the web and the app. However, the setup has always been simple with little detail available. Recently, I spent some time researching it and decided to record some interesting findings.
translations.建立一個 `./.well-known` 目錄在剛設定的 `root` 目錄內，: Create a `./.well-known` directory inside the newly set `root` directory and place the `apple-app-site-association` file into the `./.well-known` folder.
translations.強化了設定檔內容的功能，多增加支援 Query/Anchor、字符集、編碼處理。: Enhanced configuration file features, adding support for Query/Anchor, character sets, and encoding handling.
translations.打開瀏覽器輸入相應的 Universal Links 測試網址（EX: `htt: Open the browser and enter the corresponding Universal Links test URL (e.g., `https://ec87f78bec0f.ngrok.io/buy/123`) to see the result.
translations.新增 `caseSensitive` 指定功能，可指定匹配規則是否對大小寫敏感，: Added the `caseSensitive` option to specify whether the matching rules are case-sensitive. The default is `true`. This can reduce the number of rules needed if case sensitivity is not required.
translations.新增 `comment` 註解欄位，可輸入註解方便辨識。（但請注意這是公開的，別: Add a `comment` field for entering notes to help identification. (But note this is public and visible to others.)
translations.新增 `percentEncoded` 前面說到的，舊版需要先將網址轉為 ASC:
Added `percentEncoded` As mentioned earlier, the old version required converting the URL to ASCII before placing it in paths (which made Chinese characters look ugly and unreadable); this parameter determines whether to automatically encode for us, with the `default being true`.  
If it's a Chinese URL, it can be directly placed in (e.g., `/客服中心`).
translations.更多玩法組合可自己依照實際情況決定，更多資訊可參考 [官方文件](https:/: You can create more combinations based on your actual situation. For more information, please refer to the [official documentation](https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/AppSearch/UniversalLinks.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40016308-CH12-SW1){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.沒問題後，打開瀏覽器測試以下連結是否正常下載 apple-app-site-as: After confirming there are no issues, open the browser and test the following link to see if the apple-app-site-association file downloads correctly:
translations.為了解決上述問題，我們可以在本地起一個小服務。\n\n: To solve the above issue, we can start a small service locally.
translations.範例中自訂了一個 `food` 字符集，並在後續 `components` 中使: The example customizes a `food` character set and uses it later in the `components`.
translations.系統幫我們定義好的字符集：\n\n: Character sets defined by the system for us:
translations.細節可參考 [此篇](https://developer.apple.com/d: For details, refer to the official document [here](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/bundleresources/applinks/substitutionvariables){:target="_blank"}.
translations.經手過的服務，對於實作 Universal Links 的考量都是 APP 上並: In the services I've worked on, the consideration for implementing Universal Links is that the APP does not have a fully functional website. Universal Links recognize the domain name, and as long as the domain matches, it will open the APP. To address this, you can use NOT to exclude URLs that the APP does not support. If the website URLs are very complex, it's better to create a new subdomain specifically for Universal Links.
translations.記得帶上 `?mode=developer` 方便我們測試。\n\n: Remember to include `?mode=developer` to make testing easier for us.
translations.設定檔較簡單，只有以下內容可設定：\n\n: The configuration file is simpler, with only the following content configurable:
translations.詳細官方文件可 [參考此](https://developer.apple.co: Detailed official documentation can be found [here](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/bundleresources/applinks/details/components){:target="_blank"}.
translations.轉貼自官方文件，可以看到格式有所改變。\n\n: Copied from the official documentation, you can see the format has changed.
translations.這時候我們會看到一個服務啟動狀態視窗，可以從 Forwarding 中取的此次分: At this point, you will see a service startup status window, where you can find the assigned public URL under Forwarding.
translations.這樣不管是 `/zh-TW/home` 、 `/en-US/home` 都能支援: This way, both `/zh-TW/home` and `/en-US/home` are supported, which is very convenient and saves you from writing a long list of rules!
translations.這算是這次更新蠻重要的功能之一，新增支援字符集。\n\n: This is one of the important features in this update, adding support for character sets.
translations.進入 [Dashboard 頁面](https://dashboard.ngro: Go to the [Dashboard page](https://dashboard.ngrok.com/get-started/setup){:target="_blank"} to perform the Config setup.
translations.還好這部分蘋果有給解決方法，不然沒辦法即時更新真的要吐血了；我們只需要再 `ap: Fortunately, Apple provides a solution for this part; otherwise, not being able to update in real-time would be frustrating. We just need to add `?mode=developer` after `applinks:domain.com`. Additionally, there are `managed (for enterprise internal apps)` and `developer+managed` modes available.
translations.關於 Apple CDN 的更新機制，查了一下文件，沒有提到；查了下 [討論](: Regarding Apple CDN's update mechanism, I checked the documentation but found no mention; looking into the [discussion](https://developer.apple.com/forums/thread/651737){:target="_blank"}, the official response was only "updates will be done regularly," with details to be published later... but nothing has appeared so far.
translations.除了預設字符集之外，我們也能自訂字符集，增加設定檔復用、可讀性。\n\n: Besides the default character set, we can also customize character sets to enhance configuration reuse and readability.
translations.首先在 mac 上安裝 nginx：\n\n: First, install nginx on your Mac:
translations.點擊「Open」後開啟 APP -> 測試成功！\n\n: Click "Open" to launch the APP -> Test successful!
